title: いざ征かん、ヴィクトリーロード

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for tryouts, where Umamusume show potential trainers
what they're capable of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the day draws closer, runners devote themselves to nonstop
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there is one among them who decides on an entirely different
approach to preparing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all. Tonight, the world shall witness T.M. Opera O's
glorious road to victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What could one call an act so bold? "T.M. Opera O, Prelude to the
Crown!" ...is how it will be known.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh. From the name alone, it is sure to be unrivaled in beauty and
passion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I imagine what will come, and hark! I can already hear the fanfare of
angels, ringing from the heavens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, all that's left is to wait for the audience to arrive, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, everyone must be preoccupied with training. There aren't
many passersby at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That student is talking in the middle of an empty plaza. She's rather...
different than the other racers.
choice_data_list: (What in the world is she doing?)
(What in the world is she doing?)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as I'm thinking this to myself, our eyes meet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! You there! Welcome and well met!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you needn't say a word. I know you've come to see my most
epic performance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How could you resist? I am the librettist! I am the director! And I am the star! Gifted with a splendid cast—namely, me—it shall be the greatest opera of all time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Please, take your seat on that bench there. Ahem, attention please.
The show will now begin.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong?
choice_data_list: What do you mean you're performing an opera?
What do you mean you're performing an opera?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh... It's simple, really.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well. In three days' time, I will run in the tryouts. It is to be a
grand event, with much of the academy in attendance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And thus, I'm here performing a stunning overture to celebrate its
eve. My opera will stir talk of the race into a tempest of excitement!
choice_data_list:
But wouldn't the "eve" of the race be the day
before?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My, what a peculiar thing to claim. Who decided that the eve must be exactly one day before?
choice_data_list: You know, like, the definition of the word...
You know, like, the definition of the word...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Again, who ever said that words be restricted to their definitions?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: To be shackled by common sense is entirely nonsensical.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Why you ask? For I am king among kings! That is why I have been dubbed the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And so, what does it matter to an overlord whether the eve is one or
three days before? Heh, do you finally understand?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm, appreciation for the fine arts is an acquired taste. You'll get there eventually.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Worry not—I nonetheless welcome you as first to bear witness to my
show.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My phenomenal performance will live in your soul for eterni—hm?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold for a moment. That pin, glimmering in the midday sun—is it not a
trainer badge?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh... Haha... Ahahaha! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Perfect! I am at this very moment in need of a trainer! For I shall soon be speeding down the road to victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing less than fate! As someone so utterly captivated by my
opera, you'll be most fitting for the job!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not be shy—take my hand! Come now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Ah, I see. You are reluctant to claim such a highly esteemed role
for yourself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I understand your deep feelings about it. I, too, become overwhelmed
whenever I look myself in the mirror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And so, I offer this amazing suggestion. Become my provisional trainer
in order to steel thy will.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: We can determine our compatibility before the tryouts this way!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall neither run nor hide. Take all the time you need to acclimate to
my glorious presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! The curtains now rise on my triumph, fair trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to reason with the imposing student over and over, but she just
won't listen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So now I find myself in the awkward position of being T.M. Opera O's
provisional trainer...
